sb_prompt: WHAT KIND OF CAR DO YOU THINK YOU MIGHT BUY NEXT?  WHAT SORTS OF THINGS WILL ENTER INTO YOUR DECISION?  SEE IF YOUR REQUIREMENTS AND THE OTHER CALLER'S REQUIREMENTS ARE SIMILAR.
raw_output:
ParticipantA: Hello!
ParticipantB: Hello!
ParticipantA: So, what kind of car are you thinking of buying next?
ParticipantB: I'm not really sure yet. I'm just starting to do some research.
ParticipantA: Yeah, me too. I'm looking for something that's reliable, fuel efficient, and has good safety ratings.
ParticipantB: Same here. I want something that won't break the bank, but also has some nice features.
ParticipantA: Definitely. I'm looking at some of the newer electric cars, but I'm not sure if they're going to be practical for me.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I've been looking at those too. But I'm worried about the range on a long trip.
ParticipantA: That's a good point. I've been considering a hybrid, but I'm not sure if it's worth the extra cost.
ParticipantB: I've been thinking about a hybrid too, but I'm also looking at some of the newer SUVs.
ParticipantA: Hmm, that's interesting. I've been leaning towards a sedan, but I don't want to rule anything out just yet.
ParticipantB: Yeah, I think a sedan might be the way to go for me too. But I'm also considering a smaller car for city driving.
ParticipantA: Yeah, that makes sense. I'm definitely going to test drive a few different options before making a decision.
ParticipantB: Definitely. I want to make sure I find the right car for me and my family.
ParticipantA: Absolutely. Safety, reliability, and fuel efficiency are definitely my top priorities.
ParticipantB: Same here. And I want something that looks good too.
ParticipantA: Yeah, it's important to have a car that you're happy with aesthetically.
ParticipantB: Definitely. I don't want to sacrifice style for practicality.
ParticipantA: Yeah, it's all about finding the right balance.
ParticipantB: Exactly. Well, it was nice talking to you.
ParticipantA: Likewise. Thanks for the conversation.
